meta.title: DEF CON 33 - Never enough about cameras: Firmware  keys hidden under the rug - Alexandru Lazar
meta.description: This talk covers RCEs on multiple popular Dahua perimeter cameras with a potential resounding impact on retail, banking, traffic and other infrastructure.
